title: Bad May Be Better.
content:
Man may at first transgress, but next do well:
    Vice doth in some but lodge a while, not dwell.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Bad May Be Better.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
